name: Plaid
description: Plaid connects applications to users' bank accounts. Access account data, transactions, identity information, income verification, investment holdings, and initiate ACH transfers. Plaid acts as the secure intermediary between financial institutions and applications.

capabilities.name: link_token_create
capabilities.description: Create a Link token to initialize Plaid Link for user authentication.

capabilities.name: item_public_token_exchange
capabilities.description: Exchange a public token from Link for an access token.

capabilities.name: item_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve information about an Item including status and available products.

capabilities.name: item_remove
capabilities.description: Remove an Item and revoke the access token.

capabilities.name: item_webhook_update
capabilities.description: Update the webhook URL for an Item.

capabilities.name: accounts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve all accounts for a linked Item including balances.

capabilities.name: accounts_balance_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve real-time balance data from the financial institution.

capabilities.name: transactions_sync
capabilities.description: Get incremental transaction updates using a cursor.

capabilities.name: transactions_get
capabilities.description: Fetch transactions for a date range.

capabilities.name: transactions_recurring_get
capabilities.description: Fetch recurring transaction streams (subscriptions, regular bills).

capabilities.name: auth_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve bank account and routing numbers for ACH payments.

capabilities.name: identity_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve identity info (names, emails, phones, addresses) from the institution.

capabilities.name: investments_holdings_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve investment holdings including securities and values.

capabilities.name: investments_transactions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve investment transactions (buys, sells, dividends).

capabilities.name: transfer_authorization_create
capabilities.description: Authorize a transfer to check if it can be initiated.

capabilities.name: transfer_create
capabilities.description: Initiate a new ACH or RTP transfer after authorization.

capabilities.name: transfer_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve information about a specific transfer.

capabilities.name: transfer_list
capabilities.description: List transfers with optional date filtering.

capabilities.name: institutions_get_by_id
capabilities.description: Retrieve details about a financial institution by ID.

capabilities.name: institutions_search
capabilities.description: Search for financial institutions by name.

capabilities.name: categories_get
capabilities.description: Get all transaction categories used by Plaid.

capabilities.name: asset_report_create
capabilities.description: Create an Asset Report for underwriting purposes.

capabilities.name: asset_report_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a completed Asset Report in JSON.
